title: The No-Nonsense Guide to How to Start Selling Digital Products with Crypto — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Are you a digital creator from Nigeria or Kenya who can't sell ebooks, courses, or templates because PayPal blocks you due to geo-restrictions? Or perhaps you're tired of Gumroad's 3.5% transaction fee on each sale? You're not alone. Every day, talented creators face these same barriers, but what if you could break free from these limitations and start selling your digital products with crypto, no PayPal required? In this guide, we'll show you how to do just that, using Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) to integrate frontend wallet functionality and generate multi-chain QR codes for instant transactions. Let's get started.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The conventional payment processors have failed you, but Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect offers a revolutionary way to sell digital products with crypto, without the need for PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip. Our solution uses NOWPayments as the payment processor, which supports over 300 coins and doesn't require KYC or buyer account creation, making it the perfect fit for creators who need to reach a global audience. With our system, you can start selling your ebooks, courses, and templates in minutes, without worrying about annoying fees or geo-restrictions.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, you'll need to set up your digital product, whether it's an ebook, course, template, or font. Make sure it's ready to be delivered instantly to your customers. You'll also need to create a unique download link for each product, which you can do in Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard. Additionally, you should have a basic understanding of how crypto transactions work and be familiar with the concept of QR code generation. Don't worry if this seems daunting – we'll walk you through each step in this guide.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, you'll need to integrate Web3 Wallet Connect into your website or platform. This involves adding a JavaScript library to your HTML file and generating a unique QR code for each product. You can use Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard to configure your payment settings and connect your NOWPayments account. Once you've completed these steps, you'll be ready to start selling your digital products with crypto.
Automated delivery means the download link arrives before the buyer navigates away from the payment confirmation page.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

With your payment and delivery pipeline set up, it's time to go live and make your first sale. To do this, simply create a new product listing on your website or platform, using the unique QR code generated by Web3 Wallet Connect. As customers scan the QR code, they'll be prompted to send the corresponding amount of crypto to your NOWPayments account. Once the transaction is confirmed, the product will be delivered instantly to the customer, and you'll receive the payment in the same transaction.
Scaling Once the System Is Running
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal? You can sell an ebook online without PayPal by using Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, which integrates frontend wallet functionality and generates multi-chain QR codes for instant transactions. This solution uses NOWPayments as the payment processor, which supports over 300 coins and doesn't require KYC or buyer account creation.
Every digital file type — ebooks, fonts, presets, plugins, templates — works with the same delivery pipeline.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a platform to sell digital downloads without fees, look no further than Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect. With its frontend wallet integration and multi-chain QR code generation, you can start selling your ebooks, courses, and templates in minutes, without worrying about annoying fees or geo-restrictions. Check out our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to see how it works. Whether you're a creator from Nigeria, Kenya, or anywhere else in the world, our solution is designed to help you break free from the limitations of traditional payment processors and start selling your digital products with crypto.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling your digital products with crypto, follow these concrete steps: Set up your digital product, including creating a unique download link for each product. Generate a unique QR code for each product using Web3 Wallet Connect. Integrate Web3 Wallet Connect into your website or platform. Configure your payment settings and connect your NOWPayments account in the Admin Dashboard. Create a new product listing on your website or platform, using the unique QR code generated by Web3 Wallet Connect. Test the payment and delivery pipeline to ensure it's working correctly. Go live and start selling your digital products with crypto!
No platform middleman means no percentage cut, no payout delay, and no content policy that can delist your products.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
